name: Cookbooks for the B/m
recipeInstructions:
1. BREAD MACHINE MAGIC by Linda Rehberg and Lois Conway.
2. THE BREAD MACHINE COOKBOOK; vols. 1-4 by Donna German.
All these books provide multiple recipe sizes.
3. ELECTRIC BREAD is also recommended, costing approximately $30,
featuring high-quality images and recipes. Enjoy the process!
